name: Spiko
oneliner: AMF-approved tokenised euro and dollar money-market funds with 24/7 on-chain redemption — the first European answer to Ondo and BUIDL. ~$1B AUM.
finserv: French AMF-approved tokenised MMF issuer — the first in the EU. Integrations with Amundi, CACEIS, and SG-Forge's EURCV / USDCV stablecoins. MiCA CASP-ready.
team: Paris fintech founders; institutional distribution partnerships (Amundi, CACEIS) signal serious financial-services credibility early in the life of the company.
thesis: Tokenised cash is the gateway drug for every other RWA flow. Spiko is the European benchmark for tokenised MMFs, with AMF approval and AMF-grade partners — meaning it can plug directly into custodians, PSPs, and wallets as a regulated yield primitive across the EU. ~$1B AUM inside ~18 months of launch is extraordinary.
